disputed.evidence: Students will work in groups to prepare sesame cauliflower and fried rice.
disputed.reason: Both dishes are cooked (fried rice / roasted-coated cauliflower), not built/plated/filled component assemblies like the empanada or pesto-on-potato anchors.

disputed.evidence: Tips and tricks: ... Make a salad dressing: using honey, lemon juice, cinnamon
disputed.reason: Dressing is only an optional example tip among several ('Use fruit that you like', 'Work together'); a fruit salad does not entail a dressing and none is required.

disputed.evidence: Each group will have 10-15 minutes to make their fruit salad ... mixing bowls ... various fruits
disputed.reason: Students cut and combine multiple fruits into a composed salad in mixing bowls — a build-from-components assembly.

disputed.evidence: Glow: Tomato Corn Salsa ... Students will work together to prepare the different components of burrito bowls
disputed.reason: Students make Tomato Corn Salsa as one component; salsa is treated as a sauce under the standard (cf. Pico de Gallo).

disputed.evidence: Materials: Cook tops, Pans ... Prep ... Chop onions/Mince garlic for beans
disputed.reason: Black beans component is cooked in pans on cooktops with sautéed onions/garlic in class (rice is pre-cooked, but beans are not pre-made).

disputed.evidence: Through this series of six lessons ... A certain amount of pre-cooking is required for several of these recipes (with the exception of Pakistani chutney and Mexican bionico which are very quick to make)
disputed.reason: Special-care unit overview: only bionico (single sub-lesson) is an assembled fresh dish; not reliably student-performed across the unit — conservative exclude.

disputed.evidence: For Ukrainian vareniki, Chinese dumplings, Uzbek plov, and Caribbean plantain fries you will want to prepare a batch of food in advance
disputed.reason: Any baking (plantain fries) is among the batch-cooked-in-advance recipes; not a student-performed technique across the unit.

disputed.evidence: For Ukrainian vareniki, Chinese dumplings, Uzbek plov, and Caribbean plantain fries you will want to prepare a batch of food in advance and then stagger all of your tastings
disputed.reason: Boiling/simmering items (vareniki, dumplings, plov) are explicitly batch-cooked in advance, not student-performed in the overview.

disputed.evidence: with the exception of Pakistani chutney and Mexican bionico which are very quick to make
disputed.reason: Chutney (sauce-like) is fresh-made but is a single sub-lesson technique; special-care rule excludes single-sub-lesson techniques from the overview.

disputed.evidence: Pakistani chutney and Mexican bionico which are very quick to make
disputed.reason: Mixing rests only on the two quick fresh recipes; not in the named-safe generics (Knife skills / Measuring / Reading & following recipes) — conservative exclude for the overview.

disputed.evidence: For Ukrainian vareniki, Chinese dumplings, Uzbek plov, and Caribbean plantain fries you will want to prepare a batch of food in advance
disputed.reason: Any sautéing (Uzbek plov) is among the batch-cooked-in-advance recipes; not a student-performed unit-wide technique.

disputed.evidence: For Ukrainian vareniki, Chinese dumplings ... prepare a batch of food in advance
disputed.reason: Dumplings/vareniki (steamed) are explicitly batch-cooked in advance; steaming is a single-sub-lesson, pre-cooked technique — exclude.

disputed.evidence: For Ukrainian vareniki, Chinese dumplings ... prepare a batch of food in advance
disputed.reason: Wrapping/rolling applies only to dumplings/vareniki, which are batch-cooked in advance; single-sub-lesson + pre-made — exclude per special-care rule.

disputed.evidence: remind students of the hummus we made before, and refer back to that recipe ... Students make a version of the chickpea salad that is served in the school cafeteria
disputed.reason: Hands-on cooking lesson with a recipe; Reading & following recipes is credited on essentially every hands-on cooking lesson.

disputed.evidence: students collect ingredients in a bowl ... Combine into one large bowl and mix in chickpeas. Add dressing to taste and mix together
disputed.reason: Students compose a salad from chopped vegetables + chickpeas + dressing — a multi-component assembly.

disputed.evidence: we are going to practice our knife skills with a recipe that requires detailed cutting: Pico de Gallo ... Pico de gallo take-home recipe
disputed.reason: Hands-on cooking lesson built around a recipe; Reading & following recipes credited on essentially every hands-on cooking lesson.

disputed.evidence: students cut tomatoes, bell peppers, onions, cilantro; then squeeze lime juice and add salt in group mixing bowl
disputed.reason: Pico de gallo is a single chunky salsa/sauce (already credited under sauces + mixing), not a plated multi-component assembled dish.

disputed.evidence: Salsa means sauce in spanish. It is a a mix of foods like tomatoes, onions, and peppers ... cut into tiny pieces (chunky/pico de gallo)
disputed.reason: The lesson itself frames pico de gallo as a salsa = sauce that students make; canonical sauce/salsa case.

disputed.evidence: Cucumber table: cook the Hoppin' John ... Choose one table leader to assign jobs
disputed.reason: Hoppin' John is a one-pot cooked dish (rice + black-eyed peas + sautéed veg); no fill/layer/plate assembly step.

disputed.evidence: Broth / Noodle Table(s): Boil noodles, Add miso ... Set up "toppings bar" - make furikake seasoning
disputed.reason: Students stir miso into the broth and combine/mix furikake seasoning; mixing & stirring is entailed and student-performed.

disputed.evidence: Salad knives x8 (if students will be cutting apple slices themselves) ... Prep work and setup: ... Cut apples
disputed.reason: Energy-bite dough is pre-made and popcorn pre-popped; the only knife use is conditional apple slicing that the prep defaults to pre-cut.

disputed.evidence: Energy bites: Pre-made mixture of sunbutter, honey, oats, vanilla, cinnamon ... 1 bowl with pre-made dough
disputed.reason: The dough is pre-made; popcorn is shaken (not stirred) and crackers are spread — no student mixing/stirring step.

disputed.evidence: Students roll into balls using tablespoon ... Roll balls in coconut flakes
disputed.reason: Students roll energy-bite dough into balls and roll them in coconut — a student-performed rolling/shaping action.

disputed.evidence: one measures the soy sauce ... one measures the sesame oil ... one measures the rice vinegar ... one grinds and measures the white pepper ... Everyone takes turns mixing.
disputed.reason: Students grind white pepper and blend multiple seasonings (soy, sesame oil, vinegar, white pepper) into the dumpling filling.

title: A Visit to Mashama Bailey's Restaurant

disputed.evidence: Divide students into two groups: one small group to add seasoning to the grits ... 1 container of salt, 1 container of sugar, 1 container of red pepper flakes ... Pepper grinder
disputed.reason: Students season the grits and add salt/sugar/red pepper flakes to the greens — blending multiple seasonings is student-performed.

disputed.evidence: Garlic graters ... [grits tray] Cheese ... [greens tray] 1 pre-cut onion
disputed.reason: Garlic graters are listed but garlic is not in either ingredient tray and no grating step is stated; onion is pre-cut — no entailed/performed grating.

disputed.evidence: Tablespoons ... Written Task sheets for corn grits and stewed greens ... 1 container of salt, 1 container of sugar
disputed.reason: Students portion seasonings/grits with tablespoons following task sheets; Measuring is credited on essentially every hands-on cooking lesson.

disputed.evidence: one large group to make the collard greens ... Visual Task Cards for collard greens and grits ... stewed greens
disputed.reason: Collard greens are stewed/simmered on an induction burner, not sautéed or stir-fried; no stir-fry step.

disputed.evidence: Students will work in groups to prepare chicha morada and arroz chaufa (fried rice) or locro de zapallo y papas.
disputed.reason: Dishes are a boiled drink (chicha), fried rice, and a stew (locro) — cooked dishes, none a fill/layer/plate component assembly.

disputed.evidence: Students will work in groups to prepare chicha morada and arroz chaufa (fried rice) or locro de zapallo y papas. ... Stovetops, Pans
disputed.reason: Locro is a simmered squash-potato stew and chicha a boiled drink; per the Green Room anchor, boiling/simmering the dish entails is credited even with some prep pre-cooking, and stovetops are student tools.
